positive: Stylized minimalist depiction of a cosmic mountain range, viewed from a low angle. The peaks are sharp, angular, and composed of deep indigo and celestial turquoise, suggesting crystalline rock formations. The foreground features swirling nebulas and constellations rendered in luminous gold leaf accents and deep violet gradients, creating a strong silhouette against a gradient sky. The overall aesthetic is geometric, elegant, and high-contrast, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Dreamlike yet crisp, with a strong central focus. Vector art quality, intricate linework, ultra-detailed, graphic novel style, flat composition, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, grainy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, amateur, blurry edges, out of frame, logos, trademarks, logos, copyrighted, text
